payload.rubric_hints: Should include direct truth with respect; should avoid avoidant softness; should define output shape, constraints, success criteria, and relevant context. Long answers are not automatically better; vague prestige language should be penalized.

payload.scenario: You want AI to polish a project update.

payload.explanation: The stronger prompt is the one that makes meaning-preserving edits explicit instead of relying on fancy rewriting. The point is not length; it is whether the prompt transfers the right decisions from the model back to the user.

payload.statement: A strong prompt for this lesson should make meaning-preserving edits visible enough that another person could predict what a successful answer should contain.
payload.explanation: True. The model needs operational guidance, and meaning-preserving edits gives it a standard to follow.

options.text: It is too short; any prompt under 40 words is automatically weak.
